title: Elegant Tunisian Yellow Split Peas Tagine
description: A grassy, light date-night Tunisian dish featuring yellow split peas with a subtle glaze, low-sodium-friendly and perfect for an intimate dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a tagine over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic and sauté until translucent.
Stir in the chopped carrot, cumin, coriander, and smoked paprika, cooking for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the yellow split peas and low-sodium vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Cover the tagine and reduce heat to low, letting the peas cook for 35 minutes or until tender.
Stir in the tahini and lemon juice, creating a silky glaze that coats the peas.
Adjust the consistency with a splash of warm water if it becomes too thick.
Season with a pinch of cracked black pepper and a small handful of fresh parsley, stirring gently.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with extra parsley and accompanied by warm crusty bread.
Enjoy the aromatic, grassy flavors of this elegant Tunisian dish.
